questions.question: What is the main purpose of Diffie-Hellman?
options: Key agreement over an insecure channel
questions.description: Diffie-Hellman lets parties derive a shared secret without sending it directly.

questions.question: Which property means it is hard to find two inputs with the same hash?
questions.description: Collision resistance means finding two different inputs with the same hash should be computationally infeasible.

questions.question: Which AEAD mode provides encryption and integrity together?
questions.description: AES-GCM is an authenticated encryption mode.
